docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-07-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WENDY BARTOS. DEFENDANT VINSON GUTHREAU DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-12-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK 506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. PLAINTIFF HAS REQUESTED 6 PREVIOUS CONTINUANCE DUE TO INABILITY TO SERVE DEFENDANT. DUE TO THE AGE OF THE CLAIM AND NUMEROUS CONTINUANCES DUE TO THE INABILITY TO SERVE DEFENDANT, AND NON APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ON JULY 16, 2021, THE COURT DISMISSES THIS CLAIM WITH PREJUDICE. CLAIM OPENED DECEMBER 21, 2018. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-02-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WENDY BARTOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VINSON GUTHREAU IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
